A group of House Democrats is calling on the Trump administration to openly recognize "Israel’s" undeclared nuclear weapons program.

In a letter to Marco Rubio obtained by The Washington Post, more than two dozen lawmakers led by Joaquin Castro argue that Washington’s continued silence over the Israeli nuclear program is unjustifiable, particularly amid the war in Iran and the heightened risk of military escalation.

“The risks of miscalculation, escalation, and nuclear use in this environment are not theoretical,” the lawmakers wrote. “Congress has a constitutional responsibility to be fully informed about the nuclear balance in the Middle East, the risk of escalation by any party to this conflict, and the administration’s planning and contingencies for such scenarios.”

Successive American administrations have never addressed "Israel's" undeclared nuclear program since the 1960s, with the exception of John F. Kennedy, who strongly opposed the program and reportedly demanded inspections at the Dimona facility.

"Israel", " which is not an NPT signatory, maintains a policy of nuclear ambiguity regarding its nuclear weapons, neither affirming nor denying it has them. But it is widely believed to be in possession of dozens of nuclear warheads.

#UnitedStates #NuclearProgram #Trump #AlMayadeen

Tasnim News Agency reported that Western media claims about a MAERSK vessel crossing the Strait of Hormuz with US assistance are inaccurate.

According to Tasnim, no reputable maritime tracking platforms have so far confirmed that the vessel transited the strait. It also noted that Maersk, the operator of the vessel Alliance Fairfax, has not issued any official statement confirming such a passage.

The report added that the ship’s Automatic Identification System (AIS) data indicates its last recorded position was 65 days ago, when it was anchored off the coast of the UAE.

#Iran #UnitedStates #StraitOfHormuz #AlMayadeen

Former US President Barack Obama revealed that Benjamin Netanyahu attempted to persuade him to launch a military strike on Iran, using arguments later presented to Donald Trump, according to an interview with The New Yorker.

Obama said Netanyahu had long advocated for a more aggressive approach toward Iran, warning that the same line of reasoning was later used to influence US policy under Trump.

The remarks revive attention on the 2015 Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA), a landmark agreement negotiated under Obama’s administration aimed at limiting Iran’s nuclear program in exchange for sanctions relief.

At the time, the deal marked a major shift toward diplomacy, with Obama arguing it was the most effective way to prevent nuclear escalation without resorting to war. However, Netanyahu strongly opposed the agreement ever since, lobbying against it and warning that it would not stop Iran's "nuclear ambitions".

In his interview for Al Mayadeen, Harley Schlanger, spokesperson for the Schiller Institute, argued that the #US-Israeli war on Iran cannot be understood without looking at and understanding its historical roots.

He said #Iran has long been in the crosshairs of imperial powers, first the British Empire, and later by the American-led empire, pointing to decades of hostility that predate 1979.

According to Schlanger, Iran’s principled position in support of Palestinian justice is what truly angers Benjamin Netanyahu and drives "Israel’s" push for war.

He also situated the current war as a clash between two models: Iranian "statecraft", which seeks dialogue and mutual respect, and an imperial doctrine that insists "might makes right". 

#WarOnIran #Iran #USIran

امارات می‌گوید ایران به این بندر حمله کرده اما ایران این موضوع را تایید نکرده است!

 بنابراین جمع بندی جالبی از ابتکار عمل ترامپ شد! تنگه که باز نشد؛ فجیره هم در آتش سوخت

حالا باید از ترامپ پرسید که آیا به اندازه کافی تنگه باز شد، یا موضوع را باید برایت بیشتر بشکافند؟!

و از همه مهمتر، امارات هم گله‌ کرده است که ۱۲ موشک بالستیک، ۳ موشک کروز و ۴ پهپاد به سمت فجیره شلیک شده و این بندر در آتش می‌سوزد!

حالا فجیره کجاست؟ جایی است که امارات از آنجا سعی می‌کند تنگه هرمز را به میزان کمی، حدود ۱.۵ میلیون بشکه نفت دور بزند!

لذا از حدود ظهر امروز با اعلام رسمی ترامپ، این کار را با تبلیغات وسیع توسط آمریکا آغاز شد!   

 نتیجه تا الان چه شده است؟ چند کشتی دیگر در تنگه هرمز هدف قرار گرفته و در آتش می‌سوزند؛ به‌سمت ناوچه های آمریکایی شلیک شده و ترامپ هم میگوید که کشتی‌ها اسکورت نمی‌شوند!

آمریکا امید داشت که با تداوم محاصره دریایی از ایران امتیاز گزاف بگیرد

اما پس از عدم کامیابی و علیرغم رد و بدل پیام‌ها درباره چارچوب مباحث سیاسی، در یک سردرگمی و تناقض آشکار، دیشب به یکباره اعلام کرد که می‌خواهد به روش خودش تنگه هرمز را بر خلاف اراده و خواست ایران باز کند!

جناب ترامپ! تنگه باز شد؟ یا بیشتر بشکافیم؟!

ایران پس از آتش‌بس‌، تنگه هرمز را در‌ چارچوب قواعد جدید باز کرده بود؛ اما محاصره دریایی عملاً موجب شد که تنگه بار دیگر به طور کامل بسته شود https://t.co/1w6hBLtY5S

When Israel commits genocide in Gaza— silence.

When Israel invades Lebanon— silence. 

When the ICC issues an arrest warrant for Netanyahu for war crimes — continued partnership. 

Preaching others requires having a minimum moral authority.

Oh, so when Iran defends its sovereignty in its coastal waters in the Strait of Hormuz, that's a 'violation of sovereignty' — but when the US and Israel attack Iran, massacre schoolgirls, and impose illegal naval blockades, that's just 'self-defense'?
